comment_text:
Ok, so I'm just gonna tear this clip a new one (or more precisely, just the words of silly-Günther) At 00:28 seconds he says; "The winning fighters and dojos will reap the benefits of victory".. Yeah, no shit! Then he dares to continue at 00:49, "We must all work together, to ensure this competition concludes without any more drama". Lol, ok, silly-Günther. First of all, anyone knows that ain't gonna happen. Secondly, we now know (from the trailer) that Günther KICKS Daryl in the face right after! Good job, dumbass-Günther. What was the word-vomit you spew at the beginning of PART 2? "If you're here it's because you represent everything the Sekai Taikai stands for. Sportsmanship. HONOR. DISCIPLINE"..?.. And then YOU, of all people, kick someone in the face over WHAT exactly? It'll more than likely be over something as silly as the color of a MAT! No matter how provoked stupid Günther gets, it won't justify that action. And especially by a man of his "proud" status, whom is there to seek these people's support? Lol, he's an idiot.

Ps. I'm from Denmark, and the actor playing him is also a Dane! It clearly shows when he speaks. To our ears he sounds so freaken silly to listen to, lol.

comment_text:
I need to see it but I think they are going on the wrong way. If they wanted to end it with the big tournament, a la Karate Kid 1 and 2, fine. They would have won, one of the Miyagi-Do Karate or both would have won, we get the end. But they made someone died. So the right play, in my opinion, should have been either cancelling the tournament and making the settling of score with Cobra Kai and Silver on the street, or making a tournament in the valley, but smaller, with way less hype (in lore) and in memory of kwon. His death should have been the center of focus, to remind everyone there is more than winning a tournament.
Just my two cents

comment_text: Is it just me or does Robby and not Miguel winning this tournament feel unsatisfying? I really loved the early seasons' idea that Miguel was the next Karate Kid, but instead trained by Johnny not Miyagi/Miyagi-do. The way they developed that story gave a lot more complexity to the original story and characters meanwhile Robby's story, although good, just wasn't as compelling for me. I feel like they've moved away from the original basis of the show and it feels more like a high school soap opera than anything else.

comment_text: I feel at this point the producers are trying to squeeze everything together to make more money out of this show. At first it was funny and good with john's and daniel's rivarly. Lasted for only 2 seasons. Then kreese s3 and then s4 terry silver. I just don't really see anymore the show as it was really good at first. They choose again to ruin cobra kai's legacy rather than letting johnny take over and make his own dojo and his own legacy, rather than going behind larusso's. I am not also going to talk about the downgrades some characters just went like miguel or hawk. Samantha is literally so bad, and so is devon in these last seasons. And the problem is that in the first 2 seasons we had less regular's characters so we would see characters and the show would dive deep in their life. Now it is like a show, with 50 characters, and trying to squeeze all their lives in an episode. Also kenny was a mid character, at first when he was Ck it was good, now he is a downgrade. The only positive choice they really made in the last seasons is Chosen. As a character he is funny, has really good lines and he is not acting like all rhe other depressed characters in the show.

comment_text:
Now I see in the clip that Tory is training by herself. I can think of a theory or two:

1. I think Tory chose to continue to the Seikai Taikai on her own terms, because all she wants is a fair and uninterrupted fight.

2. I think Tory tries to get everyone to forgive her after she apologizes for abandoning them. But everyone from Miyagi-Do cannot forgive Tory for going back to Cobra Kai. Even Daniel and Amanda could not forgive Tory and are not willing to help her anymore. So Tory made a choice to continue fighting in the Seikai Taikai on her own terms since no one is willing to forgive her or even help her after everything that happened.
